subtitle.en: Routines, free time, modal verbs in practice, and the big one — inversion / V2 word order.

milestone.en: Can describe your full daily routine using inversion correctly, talk about free time and hobbies with modal verbs, give and follow imperative commands, and write a self-introduction email to a language-exchange partner.

reference.note: The position-1/2/3 model finally pays off this module. If inversion confuses you, come back here.
Modal verb, infinitive, separable verb — all defined here.

vocabulary.note: Frequency adverbs pair naturally with the new daily-activity vocabulary.
Refresh the location prepositions before LP5C.

grammar.note: THE big topic. Read it once start-to-finish, then refer back constantly.
Deep dive this time — combine with inversion in LP5B.
Full review with the four sub-rules. Locks in the ik-form spelling.

uitspraak.note: Revisit if u / uu / ou still feel unclear.

tests.note: Hardest test in the course. Don't expect a clean run first try.
